summary: Smoke test passed for Kanak Sonare portfolio. Backend (GET /api/, POST /api/contact with valid/invalid/missing payloads, GET /api/contact) and frontend (hero load, nav data-testids, contact form submit -> toast -> form cleared -> persisted in Mongo with email_sent=true) all working as expected. Resend integration returns email_sent=true.
passed: GET /api/contact returns persisted records including new submission
Frontend home loads at REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL with hero heading 'Kanak Sonare'
Hero CTAs visible: hero-download-resume, hero-view-projects, hero-contact-me
Navbar theme-toggle visible; all sections present (#about,#skills,#projects,#experience,#education,#contact)
Contact form submission via UI shows success toast 'Message sent - I'll get back to you shortly!', clears form, and persists in MongoDB with email_sent=true
notes: Hero heading renders as 'Kanak Sonare' (mixed case) rather than literal 'KANAK SONARE' all-caps text - this is a CSS uppercase styling on a Title Case string, which is acceptable. Typing effect and stats counter were not explicitly polled but the hero rendered without errors. Theme-toggle click step was skipped due to a benign urllib 403 from inside browser sandbox (not a product bug); manual toggle was not retested but element is visible. Resend returns email_sent=true; actual deliverability to sonarekanak1@gmail.com depends on Resend free-tier verified-recipient rule (out of scope).
